final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3×3 character expression grid for the "仙剑奇侠传" Zhao Ling'er (赵灵儿) IP theme (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a 3D animation aesthetic — references in the spirit of Pixar character design heritage, DreamWorks expressive rig tradition, modern Chinese 3D animated film character work (e.g., "哪吒" production design); exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 3×3 grid layout with 9 panels total, each panel showing the character peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Subject: must include Zhao Ling'er (赵灵儿) as the character base — young woman with voluminous dark wavy hair and round wire-rimmed glasses, across 9 expression panels:
  Top-left: winking expression, adjusting glasses, green sweater
  Top-center: smirking expression, lowering dark sunglasses, red leather jacket
  Top-right: thinking expression, finger on chin, yellow hoodie
  Middle-left: big smile expression, arms resting on edge, black and white striped shirt
  Middle-center: smiling expression, thumbs up, orange button-up shirt
  Middle-right: neutral expression, drinking boba tea, blue sweater
  Bottom-left: happy expression, waving, purple sweater vest over white shirt
  Bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed expression, arms crossed, pink cardigan
  Bottom-right: silly expression, poking cheeks, teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: must include white paper with torn circular holes as the framing device for all 9 panels
Lighting/mood: needs a playful, expressive atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve 赵灵儿 character identity across all 9 panels; must maintain consistent character base (dark wavy hair, wire-rimmed glasses) with outfit variations per panel
Avoid: must avoid any copyrighted or trademarked elements from the original "仙剑奇侠传" franchise beyond the character concept; must avoid Western facial features inconsistent with Zhao Ling'er archetype
